mapper.select: SELECT ls.id, ls.point_id, ls.slot_number, ls.size_type, ls.price_per_hour, ls.locker_device_id, CASE WHEN o.id IS NOT NULL THEN 'occupied' WHEN ls.status = 'fault' THEN 'fault' ELSE 'idle' END AS status FROM locker_slot ls LEFT JOIN `order` o ON ls.id = o.slot_id AND o.status IN ('booked', 'stored') WHERE ls.point_id = #{pointId}
